sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Movement is a blessing».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْعَمَلَ وَالنَّشَاطَ يَجْلِبَانِ الْخَيْرَ.
sentences.translation: To znači da rad i aktivnost donose dobro.
sentences.translationEn: This means that work and activity bring good things.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ إِيَادٌ يَجْلِسُ كَثِيرًا وَيَشْعُرُ بِالْكَسَلِ.
sentences.translation: Ijad je puno sjedio i osjećao se lijenjem.
sentences.translationEn: Iyad used to sit a lot and feel lazy.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ بِالْمَشْيِ يَوْمِيًّا فَتَحَسَّنَتْ صِحَّتُهُ وَمَزَاجُهُ.
sentences.translation: Počeo je hodati svakodnevno i popravilo mu se zdravlje i raspoloženje.
sentences.translationEn: He started walking daily and his health and mood improved.
